details.IncidentDetail: "[68] PER ROSEVILLE OFCR GOT WAIVED DOWN FOR TC RIEGO BTWN PACIFIC AND NATOMAS "

"[20] XRAY ADVS PHONE HIT THE MUD CANT HEAR DISP "
